Title: Abstract Cityscape Graphic Print Unisex Pullover Hoodie
Description:
Capture the vibrant energy of urban life with this modern cityscape graphic hoodie. Featuring a striking, abstract depiction of city skylines in cool blues and purples, this design makes a bold yet stylish statement.

Our premium pullover hoodie is designed for comfort and everyday versatility. Whether you are navigating the streets or enjoying a casual night in, this hoodie provides a soft, cozy feel and relaxed fit.

  • Material Comfort: Crafted from a soft, quality blend, offering warmth without bulk.
  • Style & Design: The unique, contemporary graphic print stands out, perfect for urban explorers, art enthusiasts, and modern fashion followers.
  • Versatile Use: Ideal as a layer for cooler seasons, or as a stylish gift for a friend who loves graphic apparel and city aesthetics.

Care Instructions: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Tumble dry low.
